basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Assistant Director/Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Assistant Director/Scientific Officer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: From officers holding the post of Junior Scientific Officer with 5 years of regular service in the grade rendered after appointment thereto on a regular basis.
qualification.details: From officers holding the post of Junior Scientific Officer with 5 years of regular service in the grade rendered after appointment thereto on a regular basis.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Assistant Director/Scientific Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Mizoram PSC Assistant Director/Scientific Officer recruitment is 03-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Director/Scientific Officer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Assistant Director/Scientific Officer post as per the official notification released by Mizoram PSC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Director/Scientific Officer post?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria require candidates to be officers holding the post of Junior Scientific Officer with 5 years of regular service in the grade rendered after appointment thereto on a regular basis.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Director/Scientific Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Director/Scientific Officer post will receive a salary as per Level 10 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Mizoram PSC Assistant Director/Scientific Officer recruitment involves a Limited Departmental Examination.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Assistant Director/Scientific Officer post?
faq.answer: As per the notification, Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempt from paying any application fee. Other categories' fee details should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of Mizoram PSC?
faq.answer: The official website of Mizoram Public Service Commission is https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in. This is where candidates can find more information and apply online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is LDE (Gazetted Post) No 18 of 2026 – 2027.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Assistant Director/Scientific Officer post?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant Director/Scientific Officer post is Full Time.
